title: Suspicious Minds
why_this_song: Suspicious Minds by Elvis Presley (1969) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 11 times; first heard in: "I can't walk out"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "When you don't believe a word I say?"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "With suspicious minds (suspicious minds)"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "With suspicious minds (suspicious minds)"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "We're caught in a trap"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "can't" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "can't" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "don't" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "don't" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Elvis Presley one question about "Suspicious Minds", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Elvis Presley sobre "Suspicious Minds", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Suspicious Minds" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Suspicious Minds" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Suspicious Minds" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Suspicious Minds" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
